description_for_human: Chinese advertising law compliance checker, AI search visibility auditor, and cross-border data compliance assessor. Covers 200+ banned words, 5 Chinese AI engines, and PIPL/GDPR/CCPA assessment.
description_for_model: Provides three tools for Chinese market compliance: (1) check text for Chinese advertising law violations and platform-specific banned words across Baidu/Douyin/Xiaohongshu/Taobao/WeChat with safe replacement suggestions, (2) audit brand visibility in Chinese AI search engines (DeepSeek/Kimi/豆包/通义千问/文心一言) with citation scoring, (3) assess cross-border data transfer compliance (PIPL/GDPR/CCPA) for applications handling Chinese user data. All tools return structured JSON with risk-level classification.
